Package index

All functions

cluster_bouquet()
Cluster Time Series by Directional Dynamics
format(<bouquet_plot>)
Format a bouquet_plot for display
make_plot_bouquet()
Angular Accumulation (Flower Bouquet) Plot for Time Series
make_plot_bouquet_interactive()
Interactive Angular Accumulation Plot (plotly hover tooltips)
plot_cluster_quality()
Plot silhouette scores across k values for a cluster_bouquet result
print(<bouquet_plot>)
Print a bouquet_plot object
save_bouquet()
Save a bouquet plot to a file
summary(<cluster_bouquet>)
Summarise a cluster_bouquet result
